description: REVOKE of a sequence that has not yet been processed MUST cause that packet to be discarded; if REQUIRES_ACK was set, the suppressed NUDGE confirms discard
notes: This test relies on the implementation not sending a NUDGE before it has processed the REVOKE. It sends REVOKE immediately after PUSH+REQUIRES_ACK on the assumption that single-threaded implementations process packets in order. Timing-sensitive: a parallel-processing implementation may already have queued the NUDGE.

steps.comment: Sent immediately after PUSH, before the implementation can process the PUSH.
No NUDGE MUST arrive. REVOKE discards the PUSH so no acknowledgement is due.
